children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: A State that receives a grant under shall use the funds made available through the grant to carry out systems change activities that accomplish the purposes of this subchapter.section 15093 of this title

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: b Special rule
children.text: In carrying out activities authorized under this subchapter, a State shall ensure that such activities address the needs of families of children with disabilities from unserved or underserved populations.
